name: remind
description: Set reminders with natural language time parsing
author: CupBots
intent: Set a personal reminder to do something at a specific time
not_intent: Creating calendar events or sending WhatsApp messages

marketplace.tagline: Set reminders with natural language like '2h' or 'friday 3pm'
marketplace.long_description: Never forget a follow-up again. Set reminders using natural time expressions — relative (30m, 2h, 1d) or absolute (friday 3pm, march 25). List and manage pending reminders from any chat.
